name: Tim Meadows
blurb: One of SNL's longest-serving cast members, creator of the Ladies Man.
bio: Tim Meadows is an American comedian and actor who was a Saturday Night Live cast member from 1991 to 2000, where he created the smooth-talking character Leon Phelps, the Ladies Man. He has since been a prolific film and television character actor.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
